issues.title: 8 JavaScript console error(s) on load
issues.description: Loading https://namastedev.com/ produced 8 console error(s), e.g.: Minified React error #418; visit https://react.dev/errors/418 for the full message or use the non-minified dev environment for full errors and additional helpful warnings.
issues.businessImpact: Console errors usually mean something on the page silently failed — features users depend on may simply not work.
issues.fix: Reproduce in DevTools, fix the underlying exceptions, and add error monitoring so regressions surface.

issues.title: 382 elements use inline style attributes
issues.description: https://namastedev.com/ has 382 elements with style="…" attributes. Heavy inline styling bloats HTML, defeats caching, and makes consistent theming hard.
issues.businessImpact: Style scattered through markup slows page weight and multiplies the cost of every future design change.
issues.fix: Move repeated inline styles into stylesheet classes.

issues.title: Multiple H1 headings (2)
issues.description: https://namastedev.com/ has 2 H1 headings. Multiple H1s dilute the page's topical focus and confuse screen-reader document outlines.
issues.businessImpact: The H1 anchors both SEO relevance and the visual hierarchy; getting it wrong weakens rankings and scannability.
issues.fix: Use exactly one H1 that states the page's primary topic; demote the rest to H2/H3.

issues.title: 4 render-blocking external script(s)
issues.description: https://namastedev.com/ loads 4 external script(s) without async or defer. Each one blocks HTML parsing until it downloads and executes.
issues.businessImpact: Render-blocking scripts directly delay first paint — visitors stare at a blank page while third-party code loads.
issues.fix: Add defer (order-preserving) or async to every external script that isn't needed before first paint.

issues.title: Canonical tag is missing
issues.description: https://namastedev.com/ declares no rel="canonical". If the page is reachable under multiple URLs (params, trailing slash, www), search engines may split its ranking signals.
issues.businessImpact: Duplicate-URL variants dilute link equity and can cause the wrong URL to rank — or none at all.
issues.fix: Add a self-referencing canonical link to the page <head>.

issues.title: No favicon declared
issues.description: https://namastedev.com/ declares no favicon link. Browser tabs, bookmarks, and Google result pages show a generic icon.
issues.businessImpact: A missing favicon is a small but visible brand-polish gap everywhere your site is listed.
issues.fix: Add a favicon and standard touch icons to the <head>.

issues.title: Meta description length problem (226 chars — too long)
issues.description: The meta description on https://namastedev.com/ is 226 chars — too long. Google truncates snippets around 160 characters and may ignore very short ones.
issues.businessImpact: A truncated or thin snippet weakens your pitch on the results page and lowers click-through.
issues.fix: Rewrite the description to 50–160 characters with a clear value proposition.

issues.title: Meta description length problem (199 chars — too long)
issues.description: The meta description on https://namastedev.com/practice?search=&sortBy=default&language=All&difficulty_level=All&status=All&companies=All&tags=All&page=1 is 199 chars — too long. Google truncates snippets around 160 characters and may ignore very short ones.
issues.businessImpact: A truncated or thin snippet weakens your pitch on the results page and lowers click-through.
issues.fix: Rewrite the description to 50–160 characters with a clear value proposition.

issues.title: Title length problem (68 chars — too long)
issues.description: The title on https://namastedev.com/ is 68 chars — too long: "NamasteDev - Learn Coding, DSA & Software Development | Akshay Saini". Google truncates titles over ~60 characters and tends to rewrite very short ones.
issues.businessImpact: A truncated or rewritten title costs click-through from search results — the snippet no longer says what you chose.
issues.fix: Rewrite the title to 10–60 characters, front-loading the primary keyword.

issues.title: Title length problem (61 chars — too long)
issues.description: The title on https://namastedev.com/learn/namaste-dsa is 61 chars — too long: "Namaste DSA - Learn Data Structures & Algorithms from scratch". Google truncates titles over ~60 characters and tends to rewrite very short ones.
issues.businessImpact: A truncated or rewritten title costs click-through from search results — the snippet no longer says what you chose.
issues.fix: Rewrite the title to 10–60 characters, front-loading the primary keyword.

issues.title: Duplicate title tag on 2 pages
issues.description: Multiple pages share the same <title>: "Learn Coding Courses - React, Frontend Design, JavaScript" on 2 pages (https://namastedev.com/learn?coupon=monsoon26, https://namastedev.com/learn)
issues.businessImpact: Search engines cannot tell duplicate-titled pages apart and may index only one — the rest lose their rankings.
issues.fix: Give each page a unique, descriptive title under 60 characters.

issues.title: Poor Lighthouse performance score (36/100)
issues.description: https://namastedev.com/ scores 36/100 on Lighthouse performance. Key metrics: LCP 7.0s, TBT 3.5s, CLS 0.05.
issues.businessImpact: Slow pages lose visitors before content appears — every extra second of load costs roughly 7% of conversions.
issues.fix: Compress the LCP image, defer non-critical JS/CSS, and lazy-load below-fold assets. The raw Lighthouse report pinpoints the heaviest opportunities.

issues.title: Slow Largest Contentful Paint (7.0s)
issues.description: The main content of https://namastedev.com/ takes 7.0s to paint (Google's "good" threshold is 2.5s).
issues.businessImpact: Visitors stare at an incomplete page — high LCP strongly correlates with bounce rate and hurts Core Web Vitals ranking.
issues.fix: Optimize the LCP element: compress/preload the hero image or reduce render-blocking resources before it.

issues.title: Main thread blocked for 3.5s
issues.description: JavaScript blocks the main thread of https://namastedev.com/ for 3.5s during load — taps and clicks queue up unanswered.
issues.businessImpact: An unresponsive page feels broken; users double-tap, rage-click, or leave.
issues.fix: Split long tasks, defer non-critical scripts, and drop unused JavaScript.

issues.title: Buttons must have discernible text (1 element)
issues.description: axe-core flags 1 element(s) on https://namastedev.com/ for "button-name" (impact: critical). Ensure buttons have discernible text First affected element: .ml-4.items-center.flex > .mr-2
issues.businessImpact: Accessibility violations exclude assistive-technology users and expose the business to ADA/EAA compliance risk.
issues.fix: Follow the axe guidance: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/button-name?application=playwright

issues.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds (8 elements)
issues.description: axe-core flags 8 element(s) on https://namastedev.com/ for "color-contrast" (impact: serious). Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds First affected element: .group-hover\:\[animation-play-state\:paused\].justify-around.animate-marquee:nth-child(1) > a[href$="namaste-dsa"] > .m
issues.businessImpact: Accessibility violations exclude assistive-technology users and expose the business to ADA/EAA compliance risk.
issues.fix: Follow the axe guidance: https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/color-contrast?application=playwright

issues.title: Links must have discernible text (64 elements)
issues.description: axe-core flags 64 element(s) on https://namastedev.com/ for "link-name" (impact: serious). Ensure links have discernible text First affected element: .testi-scroll-col.min-w-0.flex-1:nth-child(1) > .testi-auto-track > .gap-y-3.p-8.bg-slate-100:nth-child(1) > .items-star
issues.businessImpact: Accessibility violations exclude assistive-technology users and expose the business to ADA/EAA compliance risk.

issues.title: Content-Security-Policy header missing
issues.description: No content-security-policy header on responses from https://namastedev.com/.
issues.businessImpact: Without CSP, any injected script runs unrestricted — the main defense-in-depth against XSS is absent.
issues.fix: Add a CSP at the web-server level; roll out in report-only mode first.

issues.title: Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) header missing
issues.description: No strict-transport-security header on responses from https://namastedev.com/.
issues.businessImpact: First visits can be silently downgraded to HTTP by an on-path attacker (SSL-stripping).
issues.fix: Add the HSTS header with a long max-age once HTTPS is stable.

issues.title: X-Content-Type-Options header missing
issues.description: No x-content-type-options header on responses from https://namastedev.com/.
issues.businessImpact: Browsers may MIME-sniff responses into executable types, enabling drive-by content attacks.
issues.fix: Add the nosniff header on every response.

issues.title: Clickjacking protection missing (X-Frame-Options)
issues.description: No x-frame-options header on responses from https://namastedev.com/.
issues.businessImpact: The site can be framed by hostile pages and used in clickjacking overlays against your users.
issues.fix: Add X-Frame-Options (or CSP frame-ancestors).

issues.title: Referrer-Policy header missing
issues.description: No referrer-policy header on responses from https://namastedev.com/.
issues.businessImpact: Full URLs (including query params) leak to every third-party site you link to.
issues.fix: Add a restrictive referrer policy.

issues.title: Permissions-Policy header missing
issues.description: No permissions-policy header on responses from https://namastedev.com/.
issues.businessImpact: Embedded third-party content can request powerful browser features (camera, geolocation) unhindered.
issues.fix: Declare which features the site actually needs; deny the rest.

issues.title: 22 broken internal link(s)
issues.description: Links on https://namastedev.com/ return errors: https://namastedev.com/learn/namaste-node (403), https://namastedev.com/learn/namaste-frontend-system-design (403), https://namastedev.com/learn/namaste-react (403), https://namastedev.com/learn/namaste-react--namaste-node (403), https://namastedev.com/learn/namaste-react--namaste-frontend-system-design (403)
issues.businessImpact: Visitors hitting 404s mid-journey rarely retry, and broken links waste crawl budget and erode search trust.
issues.fix: Update the links to the current URLs or add 301 redirects from the old paths.

issues.title: 8 broken internal link(s)
issues.description: Links on https://namastedev.com/learn?coupon=monsoon26 return errors: https://namastedev.com/blog?utm_source=sidebar&utm_medium=website&utm_campaign=sidebar&utm_content=sidebar_field&utm_term=sidebarBlog (403), https://namastedev.com/showcase-portfolio (403), https://namastedev.com/resources (403), https://namastedev.com/roadmaps (403), https://namastedev.com/namaste-dsa-sheet (403)
issues.businessImpact: Visitors hitting 404s mid-journey rarely retry, and broken links waste crawl budget and erode search trust.
issues.fix: Update the links to the current URLs or add 301 redirects from the old paths.
